endpoints.description: API view over fct_revenue_per_user_weekly. Per-user weekly revenue keyed on `user_pseudonym` — the canonical join key for cross-sector user-overlap queries. Filterable by week range and `is_revenue_active`.

columns.name: week
columns.desc: ISO week start (Monday).

columns.name: user_pseudonym
columns.desc: Cross-sector pseudonym (sipHash64 of lowercased address).

columns.name: rolling_fees_total
columns.desc: Sum of 52w-rolling potential revenue across all streams (USD).

columns.name: has_holdings
columns.desc: 1 if user has any rolling fees from the holdings stream.

columns.name: has_sdai
columns.desc: 1 if user has any rolling fees from the sDAI stream.

columns.name: has_gpay
columns.desc: 1 if user has any rolling fees from the Gnosis Pay stream.

columns.name: has_gnosis_app
columns.desc: 1 if user has any rolling fees from the Gnosis App stream.

columns.name: n_streams
columns.desc: Number of distinct streams the user accrued fees in.

columns.name: is_revenue_active
columns.desc: 1 iff rolling_fees_total >= $6 (Dune active-user threshold).

filters.name: is_revenue_active
filters.desc: Filter to users above the $6 / 52w threshold (1 or 0)

endpoints.description: API view over fct_revenue_per_user_monthly. Per-user monthly revenue keyed on `user_pseudonym`. Filterable by month range and `is_revenue_active`.

columns.name: month
columns.desc: First day of the calendar month.

columns.name: user_pseudonym
columns.desc: Cross-sector pseudonym (sipHash64).

columns.name: month_fees_total
columns.desc: Sum of monthly potential revenue across all streams (USD).

columns.name: has_holdings
columns.desc: 1 if user had holdings-stream fees this month.

columns.name: has_sdai
columns.desc: 1 if user had sDAI-stream fees this month.

columns.name: has_gpay
columns.desc: 1 if user had Gnosis Pay-stream fees this month.

columns.name: has_gnosis_app
columns.desc: 1 if user had Gnosis App-stream fees this month.

columns.name: n_streams
columns.desc: Number of distinct streams contributing in the month.

columns.name: is_revenue_active
columns.desc: 1 iff month_fees_total >= $0.50 (month-scaled $6 threshold).

filters.name: is_revenue_active
filters.desc: Filter to users above the $0.50 / month threshold (1 or 0)
